productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex Delhi Daredevils Blue Backpack
description: Composition:Nylon water resistant backpack with two main compartments, broad shoulder straps, wide base and fiery Delhi Daredevils logoWash care:Hand washGear up for the IPL series this season and jet set to the stadium with this cool blue Delhi Daredevils backpack. Spacious with two main compartments to carry all your essentials, and broad shoulder straps to ensure the weight of your belongings do not affect your bag, this backpack is the best way to flaunt your support for the cool men playing for Delhi this IPL season. It's also a perfect bag for a weekend getaway and short trips as the nylon enhances its durability.
